title: A Rainy Library Day
subtitle: 小学示范课
summary: 围绕下雨天、图书馆和阅读活动设计的基础句子练习。

sentences.en: It is raining, so we go to the library after lunch.
sentences.zh: 正在下雨，所以我们午饭后去图书馆。

sentences.en: My sister chooses a book about small animals.
sentences.zh: 我妹妹选了一本关于小动物的书。

sentences.en: I sit by the window and read a funny story.
sentences.zh: 我坐在窗边，读一个有趣的故事。

sentences.en: Before we leave, we say thank you to the librarian.
sentences.zh: 离开前，我们对图书管理员说谢谢。
